entries.title: What is Atlas?
entries.content: Atlas is A Teach, Learn and Study AI — an offline-first learning assistant. It explains concepts (Teach), helps you understand (Learn), and supports quizzes and revision (Study) using local knowledge and optional Ollama models.

entries.title: ATLAS Acronym
entries.content: ATLAS stands for: A (article) + Teach + L Learn + A And + S Study + AI. Full name: A Teach, Learn and Study AI.

entries.title: Topics Atlas Knows
entries.content: Mathematics, physics, chemistry, biology, computer science, programming, study skills, and your uploaded notes. Ask naturally or upload materials to extend the knowledge base.

entries.title: How to Get Better Answers
entries.content: Be specific: include subject, level, and what you tried. Example: 'Explain photosynthesis steps for GCSE biology.' Upload notes for context-aware answers when the backend is running.
